- [STEP_NAME] `Cleanup artifacts` (lines: L000028)
- [COMMAND] `gh api \ --silent \ -X DELETE \ -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \ /repos/microsoft/TypeScript/actions/artifacts/"$artifact_id"` (lines: L000066–L000070)
- [EXCEPTION] `gh: Resource not accessible by integration (HTTP 403)` (lines: L000081)
- [EXIT_CODE] `Process completed with exit code 1.` (lines: L000082)
